info.title: Elevate Business Management API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for managing business operations including Finance, HR, Inventory, and CRM modules. This multi-tenant application provides complete business management capabilities.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User authentication and tenant management APIs

tags.name: Stock Management
tags.description: Stock levels, movements, and low stock alerts

put.description: Manually adjust stock level for a product (for corrections, damages, etc.)

post.description: Invalidate the current session token and log out the user.
Authenticate user and receive a session token. Use the session token in subsequent requests via 'Session-Key' header.

200.description: Login successful - returns user details and session token

post.description: Create a new tenant organization in the system. This is the first step for onboarding a new business.
Create a new user within a tenant organization. Requires tenant ID and user credentials.

requestBody.description: User creation details including tenant ID, username, email, role, and password

get.description: Retrieve all stock movements (IN/OUT) for the tenant
Retrieve stock movements filtered by type (IN or OUT)

get.summary: Get Stock Movements by Purchase Order
get.description: Retrieve all stock movements related to a specific purchase order
Retrieve all stock movements for a specific product
Retrieve all stock movements related to a specific invoice

get.summary: Get Stock Movements by Date Range
get.description: Retrieve stock movements within a specific date range
Retrieve current stock levels for all products in the tenant
Retrieve current stock level for a specific product
Retrieve products with stock levels below the specified threshold
Retrieve all users belonging to the authenticated tenant. Requires valid session.
